---
title: "Quarto Template"
author: "Your Name Here"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
    math: mathjax
editor: visual
---

## Problem 1

Insert problem 1 solution here...

```{r}

```

Enter additional code chunks by either going to Insert –\> Executable Cell –\> R or typing / and selecting "R Code Chunk" or typing CTRL+ALT+I.

Enter equations in mathfont by enclosing them in dollar signs, for example $\hat y = \beta_0 + \beta_1 x$.

## Problem 2

Add additional problems by starting a new line and typing `## Problem Number` . Type enter and begin typing solutions.
